jd_text: Job Description Performed secretarial duties for the assigned department. Receiving and registering daily incoming mail and submitting it to the Department Director. Monitoring email correspondence and following up on employee-related communications. Carrying out typing tasks, filing and maintaining documents and records. Answering phone calls and preparing periodic reports outlining completed tasks and achievements. Qualifications Qualifications: Secondary School Experience: No experience required. Job Category Administration Advertiser Dubai Municipality Educational-level Secondary School Required Nationality UAE Only Monthly Salary Unspecified Schedule-Time Full time Job Posting 25/03/2026 Unposting Date 08/04/2026
